headline: Intel lands key first customer for '14A' chip tech with Tesla's Terafab project, Musk says
summary: Tesla's Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk said on Wednesday the company plans to use Intel's advanced 14A ‌manufacturing process to make chips at its Terafab project.  The ‌move marks a breakthrough for Intel, which has been trying to revamp its business ​to attract outside customers to use its chip manufacturing technology.  Intel's forthcoming "14A" chipmaking technology aims to compete with top rival Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co, but Intel had not yet disclosed a major external customer.

content.title: Intel lands key first customer for '14A' chip tech with Tesla's Terafab project, Musk says
content.summary: Tesla's Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk said on Wednesday the company plans to use Intel's advanced 14A ‌manufacturing process to make chips at its Terafab project.  The ‌move marks a breakthrough for Intel, which has been trying to revamp its business ​to attract outside customers to use its chip manufacturing technology.  Intel's forthcoming "14A" chipmaking technology aims to compete with top rival Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co, but Intel had not yet disclosed a major external customer.
